requirement_topic.en: EMC Emissions — CISPR 15 / NM-IEC (Mozambique vs CN GB 17743)
requirement_topic.zh: EMC 发射——CISPR 15 / NM-IEC（莫桑比克 vs 中国 GB 17743）
requirement_topic.zht: EMC 發射——CISPR 15 / NM-IEC（莫三比克 vs 中國 GB 17743）

summary.en: Mozambique adopts IEC/CISPR-based standards through INNOQ as NM (Norma Mocambicana) standards. For LED lighting radio-disturbance (emissions), the applicable technical basis is CISPR 15 (Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment), the same international parent standard used by the EU (EN 55015) and China (GB 17743). Mozambique does not operate a standalone EU-style EMC Directive; where EMC conformity is required for a regulated product, it is demonstrated against the adopted NM/IEC/CISPR limits as part of INNOQ conformity. Conducted emissions (150 kHz-30 MHz) and radiated emissions limits broadly follow CISPR 15. For luminaires with wireless functionality, radio spectrum and type-approval obligations fall under INCM (Instituto Nacional das Comunicacoes de Mocambique) rather than the lighting EMC standard.
summary.zh: 莫桑比克通过 INNOQ 以 NM（莫桑比克标准）形式采纳基于 IEC/CISPR 的标准。对于 LED 照明无线电骚扰（发射），适用技术基础为 CISPR 15（电气照明及类似设备无线电骚扰特性的限值和测量方法），即欧盟（EN 55015）和中国（GB 17743）采用的同一国际母标准。莫桑比克不实行欧盟式独立 EMC 指令；在受管制产品要求 EMC 合规时，作为 INNOQ 合规的一部分，对照采纳的 NM/IEC/CISPR 限值证明。传导发射（150 kHz-30 MHz）和辐射发射限值大体遵循 CISPR 15。对于具备无线功能的灯具，无线电频谱及型号核准义务归属 INCM（莫桑比克国家通信研究所），而非照明 EMC 标准。
summary.zht: 莫三比克通過 INNOQ 以 NM（莫三比克標準）形式採納基於 IEC/CISPR 的標準。對於 LED 照明無線電騷擾（發射），適用技術基礎為 CISPR 15（電氣照明及類似設備無線電騷擾特性的限值和測量方法），即歐盟（EN 55015）和中國（GB 17743）採用的同一國際母標準。莫三比克不實行歐盟式獨立 EMC 指令；在受管制產品要求 EMC 合規時，作為 INNOQ 合規的一部分，對照採納的 NM/IEC/CISPR 限值證明。傳導發射（150 kHz-30 MHz）和輻射發射限值大體遵循 CISPR 15。對於具備無線功能的燈具，無線電頻譜及型號核准義務歸屬 INCM（莫三比克國家通信研究所），而非照明 EMC 標準。

standards_or_laws: CISPR 15 — Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment (international parent standard adopted via NM/IEC by INNOQ)
INCM (Instituto Nacional das Comunicacoes de Mocambique) — radio spectrum / type-approval authority for wireless-enabled luminaires

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB 17743-2017 (Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment), technically aligned with CISPR 15. For luminaires sold in China, GB 17743 compliance is required as part of CCC certification (covering both safety and EMC for relevant categories). Testing must be conducted at CNAS/CMA-accredited laboratories in China. Chinese CCC EMC test reports are not automatically recognised for Mozambique market access — but because both GB 17743 and the Mozambique NM/IEC basis derive from CISPR 15, the underlying limits are largely harmonised.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB 17743-2017（电气照明及类似设备的无线电骚扰特性的限值和测量方法），技术上与 CISPR 15 对齐。在中国销售的灯具须符合 GB 17743，作为相关类别 CCC 认证（涵盖安全和 EMC）的组成部分。检测须在中国 CNAS/CMA 认可实验室进行。中国 CCC EMC 检测报告不自动获莫桑比克市场准入认可——但由于 GB 17743 和莫桑比克 NM/IEC 基础均源自 CISPR 15，底层限值基本协调。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB 17743-2017（電氣照明及類似設備的無線電騷擾特性的限值和測量方法），技術上與 CISPR 15 對齊。在中國銷售的燈具須符合 GB 17743，作為相關類別 CCC 認證（涵蓋安全和 EMC）的組成部分。檢測須在中國 CNAS/CMA 認可實驗室進行。中國 CCC EMC 檢測報告不自動獲莫三比克市場准入認可——但由於 GB 17743 和莫三比克 NM/IEC 基礎均源自 CISPR 15，底層限值基本協調。

standards_or_laws: GB 17743-2017 — Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment (SAC/SAMR, aligned with CISPR 15)

gap.en: Because GB 17743 and the Mozambique NM/IEC basis both derive from CISPR 15, emission limits are largely harmonised and the technical re-testing burden is low. The key differences are procedural, not technical: (1) Mozambique has no standalone EU-style EMC Directive — EMC is handled within INNOQ conformity for regulated products and confirmed via the in-country importer, so the exporter should establish whether EMC evidence is required for the specific product at import; (2) an IECEE CB test report (with CISPR 15 / IEC 61547 coverage) is the practical international bridge, as Mozambique adopts IEC-based standards — this is more readily accepted than a CCC-only Chinese report; (3) any wireless-enabled luminaire shifts into INCM radio type-approval, a separate regime from lighting-EMC; (4) confirm the lab and report scope are acceptable to the Mozambique importer/authority.
gap.zh: 由于 GB 17743 和莫桑比克 NM/IEC 基础均源自 CISPR 15，发射限值基本协调，技术重测负担低。主要差异为程序性而非技术性：（1）莫桑比克无欧盟式独立 EMC 指令——EMC 在受管制产品的 INNOQ 合规内处理并经在地进口商确认，因此出口商应弄清进口时该具体产品是否要求 EMC 证据；（2）IECEE CB 检测报告（涵盖 CISPR 15 / IEC 61547）是实际的国际桥梁，因莫桑比克采纳基于 IEC 的标准——较仅有 CCC 的中国报告更易获接受；（3）任何具备无线功能的灯具转入 INCM 无线电型号核准，是独立于照明 EMC 的制度；（4）确认实验室及报告范围获莫桑比克进口商/主管机构接受。
gap.zht: 由於 GB 17743 和莫三比克 NM/IEC 基礎均源自 CISPR 15，發射限值基本協調，技術重測負擔低。主要差異為程序性而非技術性：（1）莫三比克無歐盟式獨立 EMC 指令——EMC 在受管制產品的 INNOQ 合規內處理並經在地進口商確認，因此出口商應弄清進口時該具體產品是否要求 EMC 證據；（2）IECEE CB 檢測報告（涵蓋 CISPR 15 / IEC 61547）是實際的國際橋樑，因莫三比克採納基於 IEC 的標準——較僅有 CCC 的中國報告更易獲接受；（3）任何具備無線功能的燈具轉入 INCM 無線電型號核准，是獨立於照明 EMC 的制度；（4）確認實驗室及報告範圍獲莫三比克進口商/主管機構接受。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — no standalone EU-style EMC Directive; EMC conformity to NM/IEC/CISPR 15 limits applies within INNOQ conformity where required for a regulated product. IECEE CB report is the practical bridge. Confirm scope with in-country importer.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 17743-2017 compliance required as part of CCC certification for luminaires sold in China

source.publisher: INNOQ — Instituto Nacional de Normalizacao e Qualidade (Mozambique)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Mozambique adopts CISPR 15-based emission limits via NM/IEC standards rather than an EU-style EMC Directive, so the limits are largely harmonised with China's GB 17743 and the re-testing burden is low. EMC evidence is provided within INNOQ conformity where required; an IECEE CB test report is the practical international bridge because Mozambique adopts IEC-based standards. Chinese CCC-only EMC reports are not automatically recognised. Wireless-enabled luminaires fall under separate INCM radio type-approval. Confirm scope with the in-country importer.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 莫桑比克通过 NM/IEC 标准采纳基于 CISPR 15 的发射限值，而非欧盟式 EMC 指令，因此限值与中国 GB 17743 基本协调，重测负担低。在要求时，EMC 证据在 INNOQ 合规内提供；因莫桑比克采纳基于 IEC 的标准，IECEE CB 检测报告是实际的国际桥梁。仅有 CCC 的中国 EMC 报告不自动获认可。具备无线功能的灯具归入独立的 INCM 无线电型号核准。请与在地进口商确认范围。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 莫三比克通過 NM/IEC 標準採納基於 CISPR 15 的發射限值，而非歐盟式 EMC 指令，因此限值與中國 GB 17743 基本協調，重測負擔低。在要求時，EMC 證據在 INNOQ 合規內提供；因莫三比克採納基於 IEC 的標準，IECEE CB 檢測報告是實際的國際橋樑。僅有 CCC 的中國 EMC 報告不自動獲認可。具備無線功能的燈具歸入獨立的 INCM 無線電型號核准。請與在地進口商確認範圍。

requirement_topic.en: EMC Immunity — IEC 61547 (Mozambique vs CN GB/T 18595)
requirement_topic.zh: EMC 抗扰度——IEC 61547（莫桑比克 vs 中国 GB/T 18595）
requirement_topic.zht: EMC 抗擾度——IEC 61547（莫三比克 vs 中國 GB/T 18595）

summary.en: For lighting-equipment EMC immunity, the relevant international basis is IEC 61547 (Equipment for general lighting purposes — EMC immunity requirements), which Mozambique may adopt as an NM/IEC standard through INNOQ. Tests cover electrostatic discharge (IEC 61000-4-2), electrical fast transient/burst (IEC 61000-4-4), surge (IEC 61000-4-5), conducted RF disturbances (IEC 61000-4-6), power-frequency magnetic field (IEC 61000-4-8), and voltage dips/interruptions (IEC 61000-4-11). Mozambique does not operate a standalone EU-style EMC Directive that makes immunity a horizontal legal precondition; where immunity evidence is expected for a regulated product, it is provided within INNOQ conformity against the adopted IEC 61547 basis. In practice, immunity is often less strictly gated than safety; confirm the requirement for the specific product with the in-country importer.
summary.zh: 对于照明设备 EMC 抗扰度，相关国际基础为 IEC 61547（一般照明设备——EMC 抗扰度要求），莫桑比克可通过 INNOQ 以 NM/IEC 标准形式采纳。试验涵盖静电放电（IEC 61000-4-2）、电快速瞬变/脉冲群（IEC 61000-4-4）、浪涌（IEC 61000-4-5）、传导射频骚扰（IEC 61000-4-6）、工频磁场（IEC 61000-4-8）及电压暂降/中断（IEC 61000-4-11）。莫桑比克不实行将抗扰度作为横向法律先决条件的欧盟式独立 EMC 指令；在受管制产品预期提供抗扰度证据时，作为 INNOQ 合规的一部分对照采纳的 IEC 61547 基础提供。实践中，抗扰度的把关通常弱于安全；请就具体产品向在地进口商确认要求。
summary.zht: 對於照明設備 EMC 抗擾度，相關國際基礎為 IEC 61547（一般照明設備——EMC 抗擾度要求），莫三比克可通過 INNOQ 以 NM/IEC 標準形式採納。試驗涵蓋靜電放電（IEC 61000-4-2）、電快速瞬變/脈衝群（IEC 61000-4-4）、浪湧（IEC 61000-4-5）、傳導射頻騷擾（IEC 61000-4-6）、工頻磁場（IEC 61000-4-8）及電壓暫降/中斷（IEC 61000-4-11）。莫三比克不實行將抗擾度作為橫向法律先決條件的歐盟式獨立 EMC 指令；在受管制產品預期提供抗擾度證據時，作為 INNOQ 合規的一部分對照採納的 IEC 61547 基礎提供。實踐中，抗擾度的把關通常弱於安全；請就具體產品向在地進口商確認要求。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61547 — Equipment for general lighting purposes — EMC immunity requirements (international basis adopted via NM/IEC by INNOQ where applicable)

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB/T 18595-2014 (General requirements for the electromagnetic immunity of lighting equipment), technically equivalent to IEC 61547:2009. GB/T 18595 is a recommended standard (T = tuijian, recommended) and is less strictly enforced than the CN emissions standard GB 17743. CCC certification for CN luminaires generally focuses more on safety and emissions than immunity. Because Mozambique's basis is also IEC 61547, a product already meeting GB/T 18595 typically meets the same technical levels.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB/T 18595-2014（照明设备的电磁抗扰度要求），技术上等同于 IEC 61547:2009。GB/T 18595 为推荐性标准（T = 推荐），执行力度弱于中国发射标准 GB 17743。针对中国灯具的 CCC 认证通常更侧重安全和发射而非抗扰度。由于莫桑比克基础同为 IEC 61547，已符合 GB/T 18595 的产品通常满足相同技术水平。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB/T 18595-2014（照明設備的電磁抗擾度要求），技術上等同於 IEC 61547:2009。GB/T 18595 為推薦性標準（T = 推薦），執行力度弱於中國發射標準 GB 17743。針對中國燈具的 CCC 認證通常更側重安全和發射而非抗擾度。由於莫三比克基礎同為 IEC 61547，已符合 GB/T 18595 的產品通常滿足相同技術水平。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18595-2014 — General requirements for the electromagnetic immunity of lighting equipment (SAC/SAMR — recommended standard, aligned with IEC 61547:2009)

gap.en: Both the Mozambique basis and CN GB/T 18595 derive from IEC 61547, so the technical content is largely identical and a product tested to GB/T 18595 generally meets the same immunity levels — the re-testing burden is minimal. The differences are procedural: (1) Mozambique has no EU-style EMC Directive making immunity a horizontal precondition, so whether immunity evidence is required at all depends on the specific regulated-product treatment under INNOQ — confirm with the in-country importer; (2) an IECEE CB report covering IEC 61547 is the practical bridge given Mozambique's IEC-adopting posture; (3) China's GB/T 18595 is recommended-only and may not have been tested for in a CCC file, so a CN-market product might lack immunity test reports even though it would likely pass. Where immunity evidence is expected, include an IEC 61547 report from an accredited lab in the technical file.
gap.zh: 莫桑比克基础与中国 GB/T 18595 均源自 IEC 61547，因此技术内容基本一致，按 GB/T 18595 测试的产品通常满足相同抗扰度水平——重测负担极小。差异为程序性：（1）莫桑比克无将抗扰度作为横向先决条件的欧盟式 EMC 指令，因此是否需要抗扰度证据取决于 INNOQ 下该具体受管制产品的处理方式——请与在地进口商确认；（2）鉴于莫桑比克采纳 IEC 的立场，涵盖 IEC 61547 的 IECEE CB 报告是实际桥梁；（3）中国 GB/T 18595 仅为推荐性，CCC 文件中可能未做检测，因此中国市场产品可能缺少抗扰度检测报告，尽管其很可能通过。在预期提供抗扰度证据时，应将认可实验室出具的 IEC 61547 报告纳入技术文件。
gap.zht: 莫三比克基礎與中國 GB/T 18595 均源自 IEC 61547，因此技術內容基本一致，按 GB/T 18595 測試的產品通常滿足相同抗擾度水平——重測負擔極小。差異為程序性：（1）莫三比克無將抗擾度作為橫向先決條件的歐盟式 EMC 指令，因此是否需要抗擾度證據取決於 INNOQ 下該具體受管制產品的處理方式——請與在地進口商確認；（2）鑒於莫三比克採納 IEC 的立場，涵蓋 IEC 61547 的 IECEE CB 報告是實際橋樑；（3）中國 GB/T 18595 僅為推薦性，CCC 文件中可能未做檢測，因此中國市場產品可能缺少抗擾度檢測報告，儘管其很可能通過。在預期提供抗擾度證據時，應將認可實驗室出具的 IEC 61547 報告納入技術文件。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional / often not gated — no EU-style EMC Directive making immunity a horizontal precondition; IEC 61547 immunity evidence provided within INNOQ conformity where required for a regulated product. Confirm scope with in-country importer.
mandatory_status.cn: Recommended — GB/T 18595-2014 is a recommended (non-mandatory) standard; immunity testing is not universally enforced for all luminaire categories under CCC

source.publisher: INNOQ — Instituto Nacional de Normalizacao e Qualidade (Mozambique)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Mozambique's lighting EMC immunity basis (where applied) is IEC 61547, the same parent standard as China's recommended GB/T 18595, so the technical content is largely identical and the re-testing burden is minimal. Mozambique has no EU-style EMC Directive making immunity a horizontal precondition; immunity evidence is provided within INNOQ conformity where required. An IECEE CB report covering IEC 61547 is the practical bridge. Because GB/T 18595 is recommended-only, a CN-market product may lack immunity test reports even though it would likely pass. Confirm the requirement with the in-country importer.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 莫桑比克照明 EMC 抗扰度基础（在适用时）为 IEC 61547，与中国推荐性 GB/T 18595 同一母标准，因此技术内容基本一致，重测负担极小。莫桑比克无将抗扰度作为横向先决条件的欧盟式 EMC 指令；在要求时，抗扰度证据在 INNOQ 合规内提供。涵盖 IEC 61547 的 IECEE CB 报告是实际桥梁。由于 GB/T 18595 仅为推荐性，中国市场产品可能缺少抗扰度检测报告，尽管其很可能通过。请与在地进口商确认要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 莫三比克照明 EMC 抗擾度基礎（在適用時）為 IEC 61547，與中國推薦性 GB/T 18595 同一母標準，因此技術內容基本一致，重測負擔極小。莫三比克無將抗擾度作為橫向先決條件的歐盟式 EMC 指令；在要求時，抗擾度證據在 INNOQ 合規內提供。涵蓋 IEC 61547 的 IECEE CB 報告是實際橋樑。由於 GB/T 18595 僅為推薦性，中國市場產品可能缺少抗擾度檢測報告，儘管其很可能通過。請與在地進口商確認要求。
